name: seed corpus: seed/fp-examples/<rule-id>/ contains exactly 30 pre-graded false-positive example JSONL records per existing rule
command: for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/fp-examples"/*/; do count=$(wc -l < "$d/examples.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); [ "$count" = "30" ] || { echo "FAIL $(basename $d) has $count expected 30" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
